creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
It seems I submitted a bit hurried. Sorry for that.

Tinderbox and config.log gave me some more hints about missing 
libraries, missing python and some py-ports.
I am not sure if the vigra port should provide py-sphinx as an option 
for creating better documents?

Is there a more elegant way for BUILD_DEPENDS and RUN_DEPENDS, if only 
devel/py-nose, math/py-numpy are needed after build, but devel/doxygen 
and textproc/py-sphinx not?

And there is a big problem with using py-numpy, if devel/atlas is 
installed! I such cases the vigra configure script will not find the 
right blas library. I would like a hint in the pre install process about 
this.

The new patch looks as following (see attachment):
